main_flows.description: Feedback batch optimization plan generation from request to API/UI projection.

scenarios.description: Signal, batch, attribution, batch plan, execution, regression, and publish complete successfully.
fob-da60-like batch generated candidate eval cases must be promoted before regression, then the optimization loop runs through execution, regression, impact analysis, and publish.
Repeated plan generation does not leave duplicate active jobs and failed jobs are replaced.
Formatter failure preserves diagnostics and exposes optimization_plan_error.
Backend-owned identifiers and context fields override polluted agent output.
Incomplete formatter task does not disappear and is projected as a visible blocker.
Human edits to plan tasks update future optimization task inputs and invalidate stale execution jobs.
One-click execution runs all actionable plan tasks, creates one Agent version for workspace tasks, rejects unsafe inputs and dirty workspace preflight, and can roll back to the pre-execution version.

Pre-merge queued agent jobs persisted with a removed profile_name (e.g. attribution-analyzer) execute via the job_type to spec governor profile, not the stale persisted name (no DB migration after Governor merge).

Optimization plan tab renders empty state, generated plan, generation failure and timeout details including background job refresh, editable plan task states, dirty workspace preflight, one-click execution controls, and execution record details.

main_flows.description: v2.7 cross-gen rebuild: ImprovementItem is the single event-level governance domain entity, created and advanced through its stage state machine, scoped by business agent, and exposed through the target governance UI path.

scenarios.description: Create an improvement item under a business agent, list it scoped by agent, read detail, advance stages through the central state machine, and reject illegal stage transitions.

The v2.7 user-facing governance path exposes the simplified Playground, restores historical Playground runs after refresh, keeps long chat streaming pinned to the bottom unless the user scrolls up, exposes one-click bottom jump plus vertically centered user-question scroll anchors with capped/adaptive density marks and preview navigation across few/many-message cases, separates session navigation into the left sidebar, runtime settings into a drawer, Trace into the right evidence tab panel, keeps feedback creation in a drawer, and preserves ImprovementItem workbench, ContextPackage drawer, release gates, and Asset Registry provenance using stable selectors.
